mapper.select:
SELECT `a`.`id` AS `purchaseOrderId` , `a`.`code` AS `purchaseOrderCode` , `a`.`total_amount` AS `totalAmount` , `a`.`requested_delivery_date` AS `requestedDeliveryDate` , `c`.`processed_at` AS `processedAt` , `d`.`id` AS `deilveryInfoId` , `d`.`day` AS `deliveredDay` , `d`.`month` AS `deliveredMonth` , `d`.`year` AS `deliveredYear` FROM `purchase_order` `a` JOIN `purchase_order_approval` `b` ON `a`.`id` = `b`.`purchase_order_id` JOIN `approval` `c` ON `b`.`approval_id` = `c`.`id` AND `b`.`approval_degree` = `c`.`degree` LEFT JOIN `delivery_info` d ON a.`id` = d.`purchase_order_id`
`c`.`status` = 'APPROVED' AND `a`.`supplier_id` = #{supplierId}
AND a.requested_delivery_date >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startYearMonth}, '01'), '%Y%m%d') AND a.requested_delivery_date < STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endYearMonth}, '01'), '%Y%m%d') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH
AND d.`id` IS NULL
AND d.`id` IS NOT NULL

SELECT a.id AS purchaseOrderId , a.code AS purchaseOrderCode , a.total_amount AS totalAmount , a.requested_delivery_date AS requestedDeliveryDate , b.quantity , c.name AS productName , c.purchase_price AS purchasePrice , c.purchase_unit AS purchaseUnit , c.id AS productId , d.delivery_company_name AS deliveryCompanyName , d.vehicle_number AS vehicleNumber , d.tracking_number AS trackingNumber , d.expected_date AS expectedDate , d.id AS deliveryInfoId FROM purchase_order a LEFT JOIN purchase_order_product b ON a.id = b.purchase_order_id LEFT JOIN product c ON b.product_id = c.id LEFT JOIN delivery_info d ON a.id = d.purchase_order_id WHERE a.id = #{purchaseOrderId} AND a.supplier_id = #{supplierId}
